meta_title: For Students: client workflow to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Client Workflow to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Break the cycle of unfinished projects. Learn a professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship your first real-world AI app.
content.answer_block: You are failing to finish because you lack a defined scope, not because you lack coding skill. By adopting a professional client workflow, you treat your project as a commercial deliverable. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code to enforce strict, iterative feature development to ensure you cross the finish line.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: a pristine repository, high-fidelity dreams, and three weeks later, a graveyard of abandoned features. You are trapped in the 'student developer' cycle, where enthusiasm is high but execution is erratic. The problem isn't your code; it is your lack of a professional delivery system.

Real-world engineering is not about writing perfect code; it is about managing constraints. By treating your personal project like a high-stakes client engagement, you force the discipline required to ship. We are going to build a rigorous workflow that turns your scattered ideas into a production-ready reality.

steps.title: Define the Minimum Viable Deliverable
steps.description: Stop building features. Build a deliverable. Identify the one core function that solves your problem and document it as a 'client requirement'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Architect. Review my project idea and generate a 3-point 'Client Requirement Document' focusing only on the core value proposition. Remove all 'nice-to-have' features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Extract the core MVP requirements from this README and create a task list in tasks.md'

steps.title: Setup the Environment with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold a production-grade structure immediately. Do not waste time on boilerplate configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular project structure for a Python/Next.js AI application, including environment management, linting, and a base testing suite.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure based on Antigravity standards'

steps.title: Iterate via Claude Code Cycles
steps.description: Never write more than 50 lines of code without a commit. Use Claude Code to enforce this micro-iteration workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a development roadmap that breaks the project into 4-hour development sprints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the authentication module. Keep changes isolated and write unit tests for every function.'

steps.title: The 'Client' Review Phase
steps.description: Simulate a client review every Friday. Evaluate your code against the initial requirements document.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a harsh technical auditor. Review the current code in /src against the MVP requirements and identify scope creep.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Review the current codebase for technical debt and deviations from the MVP document.'

steps.title: Final Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Close the loop by documenting the project as if you were handing it off to a client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README and a handover document explaining how to maintain and deploy this application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a professional README.md with deployment instructions and API documentation.'

pro_tips: Treat your IDE like a client portal: if it's not on the task list, it doesn't get coded.
Use Claude Code to write your README before the code; it anchors your development to the original vision.
Schedule your development sessions during 'deep work' hours; treat them as fixed client meetings you cannot miss.
If you find yourself refactoring for more than 30 minutes, stop and ask the AI if the change is necessary for the MVP.
Automate your testing pipeline early; a client never accepts software they can't verify.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, move to the 'Advanced Scaling' module where we integrate CI/CD pipelines to automate your delivery cycle.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming, start shipping. You have the tools, the workflow, and the roadmap. It is time to add a production-grade project to your portfolio that separates you from the crowd. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
